original_image_tags: Faint pencil handwriting in the center of the page appears to read "May 8" or "Nay 8", followed by a horizontal line and a vertical tick mark.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned blank reverse side of a document page with a blue/purple office stamp reading “TRANSMITTED,” a date/time stamp, faint mirrored text “MICHIGAN FIELD FILE COPY CENTER,” and two hole punches near the bottom.*
